name: viginti-ios-push-plugin
description: Remote push notifications for Viginti iOS: Twenty marketplace app + Cloudflare relay worker (FCM HTTP v1). No Cloudflare Queue in v1.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix twenty-app && npm install --prefix cloudflare-worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix twenty-app && npm run typecheck --prefix cloudflare-worker
scripts.test: npm test --prefix twenty-app && npm test --prefix cloudflare-worker
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix twenty-app && npm run build --prefix cloudflare-worker
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
